title: (EDIT: 2+ YEARS LATER) Extremely Durable & Reliable
text:
While I do have wireless earbuds, I usually only use them for exercising just because always worrying about a charge is a task and I tend to overlook that. That said, I just wanted something that was wired that I could use at a moment's notice and have great sound with a very good price. These 100% do the trick. I'm not some kind of cork-sniffing obsessive compulsive audiophile, but I like to have great sound with a good balance of lows, highs, and mids when I'm using the audio player on my phone without having to EQ anything drastic. With these, I can run the EQ flat and still get reliably superior sound. If the audio is not good, it's more than likely coming from the sound file and not these (garbage in, garbage out).

These earbuds are extremely sturdy and well built, and the wiring is a bit more heavy duty than most wiring that you'd see on any other earbuds. The controls work well and I have had zero issues or complaints. I really like the mesh bag and tin (like an Altoi

title: It's a keeper! (Update: Okay at best)
text:
Love the color options. Cord feels sturdy, not too much noise when I shake it. Has volume and pause control. Comes with foam ear pieces, but I prefer the softer synthetic ones. Has size L, M & S. Sound quality is pretty good. Bass seems louder compared to other brands, can't tell if it's because it's a slightly more muddled sound or because of the noise cancellation. I love how it has a pouch and metal case to store it. Overall like everything about it so I'm keeping it as 1 of 2 earphone sets.

Update: Big and chunky for an earpiece, kept falling out of my ears and I was just lying there watching on laptop. Forget about working out with these, they don't even stay in without movement. I only kept them because I could get a "free" one for a review. Which I already do whether I keep or return an item.

title: Great Earpods!!
text: I like these earpods alot. The sound comes in clear and the volume controls are easy to use. However, I'm not fond of the noise cancelling much. Other than that there great earpods. I would buy again.

title: Decent memory foam earbuds
text:
I like to use these for watching shows on my tablet. I prefer wired ones over Bluetooth just for battery life issues. I find the apple headphones hurt my ears after wearing them awhile. I picked these headphones for the price range mostly and the good reviews. Here’s what I like about them.
1: Price point
2: Ear comfort. The earbuds are made of memory foam which is nice for long tv binges.
3. The wire is made with a nice braid texture which makes it not tangle as easily. I love that!
4. The mic and volume buttons are easy to use and respond well to my apple tablet controlling the volume and pausing and starting.

My personal cons:

1: There does seem to be a lot of extra “noise” in the cord that I can hear when I move it around or when it rubs on my arm or shirt.

2: This is minor, foam earbuds are memory foam but they are a little rigid at first. The extra sizes provided are great, but they are just your standard rubber replacements o

title: So good that I had to share
text: I feel the need to start off that I am one of the pickiest and hardest to please when it comes to my earbuds. However, these have been exceptional, even with my tiny ear holes as my kids say. I’ve been through so many headphones that were torture due to fit and sound quality. To fit, I’d use kids ones and for sound quality I’d have to give up my comfort. Not with these, the foam tips are amazing feeling, the sound is exceptional, and add in they are super durable ( child and pet tested and they survived with no damage). I was so happy with them when my boyfriend’s headphones died, instead of subjecting to my back up pair {they suck) I let him use these ones. He has much larger ears and they work perfectly for him as well. He is currently sleeping with them in as I am typing this. As he was happily dozing he said he wanted a pair, so I ordered him his own in another color. I’m positive they’ll last a lot longer than the month I’ve had them and longer than the pair my boyfriend killed at

title: Most comfortable earbuds to date.
text: The rubber earpieces that took over the plastic years ago (although iphone hasn't caught on) was a tremendous improvement, but these foam earpieces are that much more comfortable and secure again.  Who knew it: Foam: the next generation.  I got just what I was hoping for better comfort, better fit, and therefore better sound.  And then to think how little they cost me, good job folks.

title: Needs a longer connection wire
text: The ear buds are comfortable and the color makes them easier to find on my desktop. But for my purposes, the connection wire is just too short. I'm using them on a desktop computer, but have to purchase an extension cord to make them work. For a phone, it would be fine, but not anywhere near long enough for a desktop. I also wish they either had a USB model or the double connecting jacks because the microphone isn't working with my desktop.

title: Mic is Staticy
text:
I got these hoping to replace my bluetooth headphones while I am working from home.

Audio works fine.

I am disappointed by the mic. I've been told by everyone I video conference with that they hear static any time I talk. They don't hear that when I use my bluetooth headphones. Looks like I can only use these for listening to music now, which is a huge disappointment.

title: Microphone failed quickly
text: After three weeks the microphone became muddled. I can hear okay through them but no one can understand me when I speak.

title: Solid earphones... Works with GS8
text:
Pros
- Cost
- Controller is compatible with Galaxy S8.
- Includes carry case, a nice felt bag, and extra ear cushions.
- Feels well built
- Very comfortable

Cons
- The right memory foam cushion was slightly damaged. No harm no foul.. I already have a couple of sets of memory foam cushions I previously purchased on Amazon. Search for "Comply 17-50101-11 Isolation Noise Cancelling Memory Foam Earphone Tips for" if you need a replacement.
- The extra cushions are not memory foam cushions. They are round rubber cushions. Not a show stopper but nice to know.
- Does not include and instruction manual.

title: Sturdy, inexpensive and work well.
text:
I bought these right after I lost the ear plug on another set of earbuds. I lucked out that they were on a flash deal. They came with a variety of different sized foam plugs; I haven't tried them all since the first pair seemed to fit well. (I just need to figure where to store the spares this time). The plugs are very comfortable. I don't find these to be noise canceling, but they are at least noise muffling. I primarily use these when I am at work or in a Starbucks or whatever, to help drown out coworkers and others. I cannot really speak to sound quality, at least in terms of music, because I primarily listen to talk shows or Hulu reruns in these situations.

One thing I particularly like is the cord. It is some sort of braided material and seems to be sturdy. This is important to me because I have an earbud holder where you wrap the cords around it and secure the ends in a plastic slot, so I feel like that final step won't damage these earbuds. Also, I had an occasion to

title: Replaced my Headset
text: As someone who used to use Sennheiser gaming headsets, I shocked myself by switching to earbuds. Originally, I bought these because I got a helix piercing and was unable to wear my headset while it was healing. However, it resulted me in getting so used to the earbuds that it felt so strange switching back. I really do love these and they have never failed me for the 6 months I've owned them.

title: Fair at best....Symphonized NRG-X  far superior sound quality, durability!
text: Negs are numerous: fair sound quality; wires tangle easily; only small size ear buds are foam, all others conventional silicone; poor plug grab and ear plug grab connectors/durability. Compared to now 3 different prs of Symphonized, at about same $20, Ludos are significantly inferior....returned and bought another Symphonized NRG-X. To expand, listening fr same cell phone, measured by 3 different people, all claimed the Ludos inferior over full spectrum...fr treble/mid/bass. I have worn ear sets for 15+ yrs, run every day, and these Ludos were ~=to $10 Panasonic's in quality.

title: Stopped Working
text: The sound and volume control are satisfactory, however phone answering button stopped working in a little over a month. Next time, will spend a bit more money for better quality.

title: **UPDATED review** (Sad...)
text:
UPDATE 3/25/20:
Really good and prompt customer service ready to remedy any issue.
For that alone, I am adding extra stars. Customer service counts.
________________________________________________________________
I was really excited to try these out for basic everyday use (commuting/gym). They look great (stylish) - the memory foam is comfortable - the sound quality with is decent - the cable doesn't tangle.
All these things were great UNTIL.. I started moving around. That's when the static noise kicked in :-( If you are sitting still, all is good, but once you start walking or moving around, you start to hear clicking and gurgling.
What a shame. Maybe I got a faulty pair.

title: Constant white noise hiss
text: Bummer, was hoping these would work well for zoom meetings with my work issued Dell laptop. They work but I have to listen to constant white noise hiss and others say my voice sounds echo-y. I do not have these issues with my  Bluetooth headset, but my company security settings messed up the ability to use that one. Will be looking for a wired headset with decent sound quality. Fun.

title: Does not work with Dell laptops!
text: These do not work with Dell laptops even though description says so.

title: 2nd pair, better than earbuds, like ear tampons + Bluetooth dependent. wires could be sturdier
text: I lose earbuds and I think they look like ear tampons so I prefer wired and these are really good except the wire from the earpiece to the phone seems cheap. I would prefer if they were coated with some type of plastic or something to give them a little bit more protection because they get really obnoxiously Tangled and seems flimsy however thus far they are superior to others and sound quality with microphone and volume buttons.Overall I'm happy with the sound quality there's an assortment of earbuds with them , beware of some difficulty to get the different earbuds on and this is my second set so the positives outweigh the negatives

title: One major problem
text: Overall these are nice for the price, but the one issue is a fairly big one. These earbuds will occasionally raise the volume all the way to max for no reason and won't turn down until I unplug and plug them back in. It is very annoying and kinda painful. I really miss my Klipsch but they seem to have stopped making the ones I normally buy.

title: Working well
text:
I have been using these for telework since August and they have been working well - my voice is clear, and other voices are clear. Music and movies sound fine, too. They seem to be lasting longer than the 1More Triple Driver; i had two sets of the 1More fail on me (L earbud cut out).
These seem to be a good value for money, and I would recommend them.

title: No microphone!!!!!!!!
text: I bought these to use to make calls. They have no microphone. They’re useless to me. False advertising.

title: Do not recommend
text: Poor quality.  Muffled and distorted sound. Will be returning.

title: You get a ZAP
text: Not sure why, but they keep shocking my sons ears.  Unwearable!

title: Very nice! One small complaint.
text: Nice! Very well packaged, as well. I appreciate the included travel bag, particularly. Sound quality is very good, and the cords look sturdy.  My only complaint is this: although it came with a set of replacement ear tips in various sizes, they weren't the nice foam ones that match the color of the earphones. They were plain black and flimsy rubber. So, I kept using the nice colored foam ones, even though they weren't quite the right size.

title: Great purchase
text: Love the hand written thank you letter. Very polite. Great quality. Very comfortable. Highly recommend!

title: I’m not impressed
text: I’m not impressed with these headphones at all. I use them to plug into my laptop so that I can hear clearly on zoom. The right ear works just fine but the left one has a lot of feedback in it.

title: Lasted 10 weeks
text:
My wife walks on residential streets.
No running
No jumping
No cross-fit
She lost one speaker and the volume control
Nuff Said

title: Doesn't work consistently
text: I would have rather returned this, than write a bad review. However, I missed the window by one day. I bought this so I could be on Zoom and not be on my computer. Inconsistent reception and sound. Sometimes people can hear me and sometimes there is nothing. A big waste of money.

title: Ok headphones
text: These headphones are OK. They appear to be built well. They provide absolutely no noise suppression at all.

title: Does not work for zoom meetings.
text: Mic problems and terrible sound quality. Had to go buy something else.

title: Not for iPhone SE
text: No receptacle for attaching to my iPhone SE

title: Disappointed!
text: They are not working. Disappointed. Trying to send them back.

title: It works. Great pricing.
text: I use this for DISCORD on my PC. It works, and the pricing is great.

title: Stopped working after 30 days.
text: These worked for exactly one month before the jack went bad. It was a mistake to stray from Skullcandy.

title: Not for me
text: I don’t like the way these fit in my ears and I find them annoying when I’m trying to eat with them on. It’s like I’m in high altitude and need to pop my ears. And they are not noise reduction.

title: Good buy!
text: They are sturdier than others Ive had and would buy again

title: Meh
text: My AirPods have better noise cancellation but hey there good. Can’t control volume when using my laptop but I love the memory foam because I have small ears so earbuds always hurt to wear.

title: Low Quality Earphones
text: I work from home and wanted a pair of earphones for video meetings so I looked less goofy than wearing giant gaming headphones. Decided to go cheap since I won't be using them much and I regret not spending a bit more money. The audio quality on these is comparable to earphones from the early 2000s: grainy and distant with static.

title: Don t last
text: Stopped working not even after one year.

title: These are great headphones.
text: These headphones are so nice. I just bought them and they work so well. I love the foam earbuds they use. If you're getting them, don't waste money on the mic. It is literally so bad and not worth the money.

title: earphone
text: never got my free pair of earphones for review. so don't buy and think you will get your free set of earphone you won't

title: Mic didn't work
text: Sort return window. Don't buy. Crap.

title: They feel solid and sound great but after less than 6 months of use the earbud broke
text: Great short term. I can probably glue them back but overall not very satisfied. Crappy construction

title: Worked great!
text: I purchased the red headphones for the hubby for the gym. It worked well in the phone jack and wasn’t loose. I was shocked to notice I did not hear any other noise from others and the sound quality itself was amazing. The extra bonus is hearing bass. Volume control was nice and the ear parts were comfortable and never fell off. However, I would clean your ears or headphones after use because it the earwax will stain the squishy ear parts.

title: Worked perfectly
text: These worked perfectly fine! That is, until my cat chewed through them. Haha. But, had no issues. Sound was fine. Mic worked fine. Good product for the price.

title: Good value for the quality
text: I bought these for my daughter. She is allowed to listen to music and podcasts at school, and these are stylish and unobtrusive. She has been enjoying them, and we will be ordering another pair for my other daughter. Seems like a good basic daily-use set of earphones. I cannot speak to the audio quality, as I have not tested them myself. But they are still working after being toted around by a 6th grader, so that's something.

title: Cute earbuds
text: These are cute, can be used with my iPod, but cannot be used with my computer without an adaptor, which disappointed me a bit. Then on the first use, I discovered that, when using for Skype or Zoom, there is a lot of background noise that the other people can hear. And it isn't failure of the noise cancellation, it is some kind of feedback from the buds themselves.  I bought an adaptor and in a pink I'll use these with my iPod, but not the best sounds quality.

title: Fail!
text: The headphones were doing great then the microphone stopped working 2 weeks after I received them.

title: The ear bud cups that keep the earbuds in my ears securely.
text: I particularly like the thick ear cups that keep the ear buds in my ears very well.I had bought many sets of ear buds and always has the problem of ear buds fell off out of my ears, until this new set. Those old ear buds had thin ear bud cups that had the tendency of piping out of my ears after a few minutes.

title: Very happy with this purchase
text: So far, so good.  Better than any similar ear buds I've had

title: Nice for the price
text: Not great on calls as some times on VoIP calls other side complaints. Very good for music/ TV/ listening to trainings and Seminars

title: Got quality?
text: Listening to a audio book and it works good

title: A+
text: Great product. Probably would purchase again. Love the thickness of the cord

title: Great quality for the price!
text: I'm hard of hearing and usually have to go to 100% on earbuds to hear but I can hear comfortably on these at 70%.

title: Mediocre, volume control erratic
text:
These earbuds are functional but sound quality is middling. The volume control is very problematic. It tends to get louder and louder during calls for no clear reason.
I would certainly not recommend paying more than $10 for them

title: A happy surprise!
text: Given the price point, I wasn't expecting much from these earbuds.  They are a replacement for a more expensive pair that shorted out.  What a wonderful surprise the LUDOS turn out to be!  Great sound, wonderful balance, good noise cancellation and great price.  I will definitely buy another pair as a spare!

title: Great Sound
text: The sound quality is a lot better than I expected for the price. Really happy overall and the purple color is lovely.

title: Nice sound quality
text: I used these on the plane to watch movies and it worked perfectly to eliminate outside noises and the movie sound was great!

title: Volume control doesn’t work!
text: Purchased these as a gift for my husband. He reports that the sound is fine but the volume control doesn’t work which is the particular feature he was looking for. I would not repurchase.

title: Great purchase
text: I purchased these a few months ago and really like them. Durable, work well, and the volume buttons are just the right sensitivity..

title: Perfect!
text: Exactly what my daughter wanted

title: Clear sounds
text:
The sound quality is great, I have a hearing deficit in my left ear, however the sound is clear enough for me.

Thank you

title: Ear Buds
text: I keep these on hand for my grandson. They work nicely. Now if my grandson would just stop misplacing them!

title: Perfect earbuds for exercising
text: Bought these for my husband. They are great for watching news / TV shows while on his exercise bike.

title: Great Value and Fantastic Sound Quality
text: These headphones have amazing sound quality.  The microphone and controls work perfectly.  I am always nervous about a product like this but these headphones definitely delivered.  They are comfortable in  my ears and will definitely meet my needs.

title: Won a blindfold test
text: Compared these earbuds directly with Sopownic.  All family member (5) listened to their mobile phone via the different  earbuds.  We listened in different parts of the house and did not share results. We wrote our opinions down on paper secretly. The unanimous winner for tone, comfort and quality of music and spoken word was the LUDOS.

title: These are good but the mic is really sharp with no sound cancelling at all.
text: I use these for streaming from my ps5 as backup to my Sony lavalier mic. I really appreciate that they came with both silicone and foam ear pieces. They work great as headphones/monitors but the mic is so strong and so sharp that it picks up everything in the room and has a minor echo - adjusting the volume with the on-wire control doesn't work, I have to do it through mic adjustment on the ps5 and have to tune it very low to keep the echo from showing up. That being said, these are my dedicated backup and I do use them quite often and even if the sound's a little less clear than my Sony mic, it's still really good. These would probably work very well with a better audio setup than the ps5 has.

title: Comfortable and clear sound
text: I really like to use them with my IPad.  They work very well.  They are very comfortable in my ears.

title: Works Well
text: Very hardy, work well and fit my ears fine. Has other alternative ear buds, too. I used the smaller.

title: Great buy.
text: Theses are great headphones. The default ear pieces are made of the same material as ear plugs.

title: Great Product
text: Great Product took it out of the metal container and have not given a second thought, works Great.  Would buy again

title: They work pretty well
text: I needed a solution for my work laptop. I’ve been having to go back into the office and a lot of people are not, so we still have a lot of zoom calls. I bought these so that I could hear what people are saying and people could hear me without needing to have the speakers on on my laptop. The sound quality is pretty good and I like the little tin that they come in for storage in my computer bag. Been using them 2 to 3 times a day for two months and they still seem in great condition.

title: Sturdy, comfortable
text: I like everything about this earphone.  My favorite by far.  I tried this earphone because it had the memory foam.  It comes with one pair.  It really wasn't very good so i bought my own memory foam.  The buttons for pausing and volume control is the best I’ve ever used.

title: Not for kids small ears
text: Too large for children’s ears. They constantly fall out. Even tried the extra sizes that came with them.

title: Stunning Customer Service!
text: I had originally submitted a less favorable review, but the owner of Ludos contacted me immediately and asked me for recommendations for improving the product. I mentioned the issue and the owner, Claus, assured me that the issue of the ear pieces being difficult to swich out would be handled to my satisfaction..  The sound quality  was impressive but the earpieces  that were  installed  at the factory were too large.

title: Comfortable, with adequate sound quality
text: These earphones come with a convenient, washable storage pouch and a tin box (similar to an Altoids container).  The earphone material makes them comfortable to wear. While the sound quality is good, I would not say it's great. I would not want to listen to high-fidelity music using these earphones. The microphone is conveniently placed and produces a voice quality that is easily understood by a listener to the transmitted sounds.

title: Good buy for the price
text: Works well. My only complaint is that it's extremely hard to put the soft cushions on the earbuds. I finally had to give up and put the original covers back on--not very comfortable.  I sure it works fine for someone with younger, more nimble fingers.

title: Ludos ear buds
text: Bought these for my son for Christmas and he really liked them!  Especially that the wires were braided as to make stronger and last longer!  Thanks Ludos for a good pair of ear buds for a good price!
